chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision application No.230 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 21.11.2025 Mr.Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G Sindh ****** None is present for the applicants. No intimation is received. Same was the case on last two dates of hearing i.e 15.10.2025 & 12.11.2025. It appears that applicants have lost interest in the matter. Dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
